title: OS floating latent window when app minimized (settings-gated)
description: When the app is minimized, show a small always-on-top OS window that displays live latents from the current generation. User opts in/out via a setting. Pure consumer of the MPI-269 preview:frame bus. KEY CONSTRAINT: a separate BrowserWindow has its own JS context = its own empty Events bus, so it cannot subscribe to preview:frame directly — the main renderer must forward frames over IPC, and a blob: URL will NOT resolve across documents (send raw bytes or a data URL). See docs/preview-bus.md and tasks/MPI-269/handoffs/bus-contract.md.
